issues.offending_span: Deutsche Bank raising its price target to $220 while Bank of America reset its price target following the earnings report [de81755d-f657-4d81-ac51-0e4d3302477e, 09dfa05d-8767-4033-aeaf-3505912b5a4c]
issues.explanation: The cited chunks do not contain the specific information about Deutsche Bank raising its price target to $220. Chunk [de81755d-f657-4d81-ac51-0e4d3302477e] is titled 'Veteran analyst sends shocking message on Nvidia after earnings' but the visible snippet does not mention Deutsche Bank or the $220 price target. Chunk [09dfa05d-8767-4033-aeaf-3505912b5a4c] only covers Bank of America's price target reset. While the factual claims are consistent with Previously Verified Facts, the specific citations do not support the Deutsche Bank claim.
issues.recommended_fix: Either cite the correct chunk(s) that contain the Deutsche Bank $220 price target information, or restructure the citation to only attribute the Bank of America claim to chunk [09dfa05d-8767-4033-aeaf-3505912b5a4c] and find appropriate support for the Deutsche Bank claim.
